productionBlockers.title: No real connector connectivity
productionBlockers.description: All C3 connectors remain synthetic-only with network disabled.

productionBlockers.title: No production protocol dependencies
productionBlockers.description: Protocol runtime does not include production transport/client dependencies.

productionBlockers.title: No complete credential and certificate provider
productionBlockers.description: Credential and certificate lifecycle is not production-integrated.

productionBlockers.title: Install/upgrade/rollback lifecycle not implemented
productionBlockers.description: Offline foundation exists but production lifecycle scaffold is pending.

productionBlockers.title: Release checksum and signature chain incomplete
productionBlockers.description: End-to-end release integrity workflow is not complete.

productionBlockers.title: SBOM and vulnerability workflow incomplete
productionBlockers.description: Inventory and vulnerability governance process is not finalized.

productionBlockers.title: Runtime management remains CLI/local-state oriented
productionBlockers.description: Operational management is local-first and lacks production remote control.

productionBlockers.title: Resource and corruption protection hardening needed
productionBlockers.description: Disk-full/corruption and partial-write handling needs stronger production controls.

productionBlockers.title: Production observability and remote management incomplete
productionBlockers.description: Current diagnostics are strong locally but not yet complete for fleet operations.

nextDevelopmentSequence.title: Offline Install / Upgrade / Rollback Scaffold
nextDevelopmentSequence.purpose: Define lifecycle scaffolding without enabling production connectivity.

nextDevelopmentSequence.title: Release Manifest / Checksum / Signature Foundation
nextDevelopmentSequence.purpose: Freeze release integrity process for offline distribution.

nextDevelopmentSequence.title: Runtime User / Permission / Filesystem Hardening
nextDevelopmentSequence.purpose: Harden runtime execution context and filesystem boundaries.

nextDevelopmentSequence.title: Service Lifecycle and Recovery Foundation
nextDevelopmentSequence.purpose: Strengthen restart/crash recovery and lifecycle governance.
allowedScope: Recovery validation and service lifecycle controls

nextDevelopmentSequence.title: Validation Performance Hardening
nextDevelopmentSequence.purpose: Reduce validation latency and avoid scan amplification.
productionRiskAddressed: Slow validation and CI bottleneck risk

nextDevelopmentSequence.title: Real Connector Enablement Gate
nextDevelopmentSequence.purpose: Define mandatory security and governance gate before any real connector enablement.
prohibitedScope: Any real SNMP/Modbus/BACnet/OPC UA enablement before gate pass

nextDevelopmentSequence.title: File Import Production Enablement
nextDevelopmentSequence.purpose: Enable controlled production file import under C5-00 gate.

nextDevelopmentSequence.title: HTTP Polling Production Enablement
nextDevelopmentSequence.purpose: Enable controlled production HTTP polling under C5-00 gate.
prohibitedScope: Industrial protocol activation before dedicated gates

nextDevelopmentSequence.title: Durable Buffer / Retry / Recovery
nextDevelopmentSequence.purpose: Promote local durability foundations to production-grade reliability controls.
prohibitedScope: Cross-package ownership expansion beyond EDGE boundary
productionRiskAddressed: Data loss and recovery inconsistency risk
